theme.oledHint: Pure black background — saves OLED battery. Only effective when dark.
theme.accentDisabledBySeason: Accent is overridden by the active seasonal theme — turn it off to pick a color.
theme.seasonHint: Festive palettes — replace Accent while active.
theme.seasonAutoHint: Switch automatically during Songkran, Loy Krathong, Chinese New Year, Christmas.
theme.iconStyleHint: Pick the visual look for all icons across the app.

landing.title: Jaitang
landing.subtitle: Heart-pocket ledger
landing.description: Track money in and out — solo or shared with the people closest to you.
landing.feature1Body: Add a transaction in 2–3 taps with rich categories.
landing.feature3Body: Personal book + shared books with partners or family.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Use your Google account to start tracking
login.firstUseHint: First sign-in creates a personal ledger automatically.
login.loginToJoin: Sign in with Google to join

dashboard.paymentMethodUnspecifiedHint: Older rows with no cash/transfer tag — edit them on the transaction page to fill in

transactions.title: All transactions
transactions.deleteConfirmHard: Delete this transaction? This cannot be undone.
transactions.emptyHint: Add your first one to get started.
transactions.dashboardEmpty: No transactions yet — tap {action} to begin.
transactions.splitHint: Pick who's in — split equally among everyone selected
transactions.fxError: Couldn't fetch rate — retry or change currency
transactions.aiCategorizeHint: Let AI pick a category from your note
transactions.aiCategorizeNeedsNote: Type a note first, then AI can suggest a category
transactions.aiCategorizeNoMatch: AI couldn't pick a confident match — pick one yourself.
transactions.aiCategorizeLowConfidence: AI wasn't very sure — double-check the pick.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Manage categories used for tracking income and expenses.
categories.empty: No categories yet — add one above.
categories.deleteConfirm: Delete this category? Transactions using it will become 'No category' (they aren't deleted).

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.subtitle: Set a monthly limit per category — we warn when you get close or exceed it.
budgets.empty: No expense categories yet — add some on the Categories page first.

recurring.title: Recurring
recurring.subtitle: Set transactions that repeat daily/weekly/monthly — created automatically when due.
recurring.runDueResultEmpty: No recurring rules are due yet
recurring.empty: No recurring rules — tap the button above to add your first.
recurring.amountHint: Skip for ค่าไฟ / ค่าน้ำ / etc. — fill in when the bill arrives.
recurring.pendingHint: Variable-cost rules whose due date has passed. Type the amount and tap to file.

balances.title: Balances
balances.subtitleSharedOnly: This feature is for shared ledgers only.
balances.personalEmptyHint: Switch to a shared ledger to see split-bill balances.
balances.subtitleShared: Bill-split balances in {name} — who owes whom (already netted both ways).
balances.noOpenBills: No open split bills in this ledger.

trips.title: Trips
trips.subtitle: Create a trip and any transaction logged while it's active is auto-tagged. Detach individual rows whenever you like.
trips.activeEmpty: No trips yet — create one below.
trips.createHint: e.g. Beach trip, Chiang Mai vacation, Friend's wedding
trips.currencyHint: Which currency this trip will be in — pick a foreign one for overseas trips
trips.currencyEditHint: Changing currency leaves existing rows untouched; new entries use the new currency
trips.archiveConfirm: Archive this trip? Existing rows keep their tag — new rows just won't auto-attach any more.
trips.deleteConfirm: Delete trip "{name}"? Tagged transactions become regular (un-tagged) rows — they aren't deleted.
trips.removeFromTripConfirm: Remove this transaction from the trip? The transaction itself stays.
trips.removeHint: 💡 Hover a row and tap × to detach it from this trip — it stays in your transactions.
trips.activateToAdd: Activate the trip first to add rows

goals.title: Goals
goals.subtitle: Set savings targets, log contributions, watch the bar fill — with an AI nudge to keep you on track.
goals.activeEmpty: No goals yet — create one below.
goals.monthlyHintLong: Save {amount}/month for {months} more months to hit it
goals.aiDisabled: AI nudge needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — set it in env and reload.
goals.aiUnavailable: Couldn't reach AI right now — try again later.
goals.historyEmpty: No contributions yet — add money to your goal above.
goals.archiveConfirm: Archive this goal? History stays visible — you can reopen later.
goals.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? All contributions to this goal will be deleted with it.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Cash, bank, credit, e-wallet — track each pot of money and tag transactions to it.
accounts.activeEmpty: No accounts yet — add one below.
accounts.createHint: e.g. SCB savings, KBank credit, Cash wallet
accounts.archiveConfirm: Archive this account? Tagged transactions stay attached; you can reopen later.
accounts.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Tagged transactions detach (kept) and all transfers to/from this account are removed.
accounts.chartEmpty: Add some transactions to see the trend.
accounts.noMatchingCurrency: No accounts in {currency} — change tx currency or create one.
accounts.dashboardEmpty: Track each pot of money — cash, bank, credit, e-wallet — and see balances at a glance.

transfers.newSubtitle: Move money between two of your accounts. Cross-currency? We'll fetch a live rate, but you can override it with what your bank actually charged.
transfers.heading: Transfers
transfers.toAmountHint: Edit if your bank quoted a different number (fees, rounding).
transfers.deleteConfirm: Delete this transfer? Both account balances will adjust.
transfers.errorPickAccounts: Pick the from and to accounts first.
transfers.errorSameAccount: From and To accounts must differ.

loans.title: Loans
loans.subtitle: Track money you've lent or borrowed — log partial repayments and watch the remaining balance.
loans.borrowedEmpty: You don't owe anyone right now.
loans.createHint: e.g. Lent ฿1,000 to Mom on May 1
loans.repaymentHint: Add partial payments — when the total reaches the principal, the loan auto-settles.
loans.repaymentDeleteConfirm: Delete this repayment? The loan's remaining balance will adjust.
loans.historyEmpty: No repayments yet — log the first one above.
loans.settleConfirm: Mark this loan as settled? You can reopen later.
loans.deleteConfirm: Delete loan with {name}? All repayment history goes too.

ledgers.title: Ledgers
ledgers.subtitle: Personal book + books shared with others — tap one to switch.
ledgers.createFormSubtitle: After creating you'll be taken to the members page to invite people.
ledgers.ledgerNamePlaceholder: e.g. Our home, Chiang Mai trip, Roommates…
ledgers.joinHint: Want to join a ledger someone shared? Use the invite link in the form {pattern}

invites.empty: No invite links yet — create one above.
invites.invalidHint: This link may have been deleted or the code is wrong — ask the owner for a new one.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: See a heatmap of how much you spent each day — darker = more.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: How this month compares to the last — totals, top movers, and a quick AI take.
insights.aiDisabled: AI summary needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — set it in env and reload.

yearReport.title: {year} Year in Review
yearReport.subtitle: Annual report for {ledger}
yearReport.aiUnavailable: AI commentary unavailable — set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env to enable.

netWorth.heading: Net worth
netWorth.empty: Add an account to start tracking net worth.

install.title: Install Jaitang
install.body: Add to your home screen for one-tap access — feels like a real app.
install.bodyIos: On iOS Safari you can pin Jaitang to the home screen for quick access.

reconcile.title: Reconcile balance
reconcile.help: Type the balance your bank app actually shows. We'll compare with what Jaitang has and offer to log a tiny adjustment if they differ.

chat.title: Ask AI
chat.subtitle: Chat with an AI that can read your ledger — try asking what you spent on coffee this month.
chat.disabled: Chat needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — set it in env and reload.
chat.emptyTitle: What do you want to know?
chat.emptyHint: I can look up your transactions, account balances, monthly totals, and more. Ask me anything in plain language.
chat.suggest1: How much did I spend this month?
chat.suggest2: What did I spend on food in the last 30 days?
chat.suggest3: Compare this month vs last month

ocr.title: Scan receipt or transfer slip with AI
ocr.hint: Upload a photo of a receipt or bank/PromptPay slip — we read amount, recipient, date, and category.
ocr.confidenceLow: Hard to read — manual entry recommended

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account, notifications, and theme
settings.notificationsHint: Get notified about activity in shared ledgers (new transactions, settlements) and budget overruns.
settings.dangerHint: Actions here permanently destroy data — there's no undo. Consider running "Download backup" above first.
settings.wipeLedgerTitle: Delete all transactions in active ledger
settings.wipeLedgerHint: Removes every income/expense record (and any attached bill splits) in "{ledger}". Categories, budgets, recurring rules, and members are kept.
settings.wipeLedgerConfirmType: Type the ledger name "{ledger}" to confirm
settings.wipeLedgerOwnerOnly: Only the ledger owner can do this
settings.wipeAllHint: Removes every ledger you own — its transactions, categories, budgets, recurring rules, and push subscriptions — then signs you out. Ledgers others shared with you are untouched.

backup.sectionHint: Download every ledger you can see (yours + shared) as a JSON file — restore anytime.
backup.downloadHint: 📦 JSON file containing every ledger, transaction, category, budget, recurring rule, and split.
backup.restoreHint: ⚠️ Creates new ledgers and rows — never overwrites existing data.
backup.restoreConfirm: Restore from a backup file? New ledgers/rows will be created. Existing data is not removed.

import.title: Import from Numbers ✨
import.subtitle: Upload a ZIP or CSV from Apple Numbers — AI maps categories for you.
import.dropHint: A ZIP of CSVs, or a single CSV.
import.aiHint: 💡 AI reads each row and suggests a category — review before you confirm.
import.previewTitle: Review and edit categories before import
import.tripsUnmatchedHint: Create a trip with this name in the destination ledger and re-upload to auto-link these rows. Otherwise they'll import as un-tagged transactions.
import.tripBadgeMatched: Will be linked to this trip
import.tripBadgeUnmatched: No matching trip in this ledger — row will import without a trip tag

quick.title: Quick add ✨
quick.subtitle: Type anything — AI parses it and saves the transaction.
quick.hint: e.g. "30 bts", "coffee 65", "salary 30000" — press Enter to send.
quick.enterHint: Enter to save, Shift+Enter for newline
quick.confidenceMedium: AI wasn't fully sure — please double-check.
quick.confidenceLow: AI guessed — open the edit page to fix.
quick.notConfigured: This feature needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY — see SETUP.md.

push.notConfigured: Notifications aren't enabled yet — admin must set VAPID keys in env first.
push.browserUnsupported: This browser doesn't support Web Push (try a recent Chrome/Edge/Firefox/Safari).
push.perDeviceHint: Each device subscribes separately — your phone and computer get their own streams.
